inputs.titre: Transfert de la capitale à Tolède

reason: The image depicts a bustling city street, seemingly in the medieval period. People are wearing simple tunics and cloaks which are reasonably accurate for the 6th century. The architecture looks plausible for the era, with stone buildings and wooden balconies.  There are no visible anachronisms such as modern technology, clothing, or building materials. There's a certain artistic license that makes me rate it a 7 and not a 10. Also, the overall tone of the image aligns with a scene of daily life in a city during that time. I'm assuming the text I see on the vendor's tent is gibberish, if it was accurate english I would have rejected the image.
